title: creative balloons Happy Birthday Balloons 40th Birhday Balloons 12 inch Silver Age Confetti and Pearl Silver Balloon Set 40th Birthday Decoration for Men Women 16pcs With 10 Meter Balloon Ribbon
features: 16PCS SILVER AGE CONFETTI BALLOONS: Each pack contains 16 balloons measuring 12" when inflated. Including Silver 40th Birthday Confetti Balloons and Pearl Silver Balloons. It also comes with 10 Meter Balloon Ribbon roll. For your convenience, our budget-friendly clear balloons are Pre-Filled with confetti. Combine with our other party decorations to continue the theme!

DURABLE AND LONG LASTING: Our Birthay Balloons are made from imported durable latex material, clearer surface, stronger and long-lasting you don't need to worry about them breaking or leaking when inflated. We use foil confetti rather than paper confetti to make it sticks to the balloon much more easily and more brightly. All you have to do is inflate them and voila!

EASY TO INFLATE: Each balloon is 12 inches in size. These birthday party balloons can be filled with air through a pump or inflated with a helium tank, great for both indoor and outdoor decoration. To make the confetti stick to the sides of the balloons best, we recommend inflating the balloons with a mixture of helium and a good puff of air!

BIRTHDAY PATTERN: Add a sprinkle of sparkle to your next party with these stunning Age Confetti and pearl Balloons! Wow, your friends and family with the trendy balloons the perfect addition to your birthday decorations. Each balloon has 40th happy birthday letter Prints with crown on top. Makes it easy to catch people's attention and bring a festive atmosphere to the birthday party.

BUY WITH CONFIDENCE: For the best customer shopping experience, creative balloon provide the best after-sales service. If you any queries about our age confetti and pearl balloon set, please contact us. Please check out our other party supplies to combine them to celebrate your birthday party.
description: Product Description DESIGNED FOR BRITISH CELEBRATIONS Whether you're decorating a garden party, a living room bash, or a classroom surprise, this set blends beautifully with UK-themed décor. The confetti balloons add sparkle, while the pearl finish brings elegance to any setting. EASY SETUP BIG IMPACT Age-Specific Designs – No more generic balloons. Celebrate each milestone with style. Premium Quality Latex – Durable, vibrant, and easy to inflate. Versatile Colour Palette – Mix and match to suit your theme. Ready-to-Go Ribbon – Save time with the included 10m roll. FROM 1ST BIRTHDAYS TO 60TH CELEBRATIONS – PERFECT FOR EVERY AGE! KIDS’ BIRTHDAYS Celebrate your child’s special day with vibrant, age-themed birthday balloons that add fun and sparkle to any kids’ party. SWEET 16 CELEBRATIONS Create unforgettable Sweet 16 memories with vibrant age-printed balloons and elegant decorations MILESTONE BIRTHDAYS Celebrate every precious milestone with age-specific balloons and decorations make birthday memories truly special SURPRISE PARTIES Make every moment magical with surprise party balloons and decorations that create unforgettable celebrations FROM AGE 1 TO AGE 60 GARDEN PARTY INDOOR BASH CLASSROOM SETUP MAKE EVERY BIRTHDAY SPECIAL WITH ELEGANT CONFETTI & PEARL BALLOONS! Adds a luxurious touch to your party theme. Easy to inflate and arrange into bouquets, arches, or photo backdrops. Perfect for indoor & outdoor celebrations. Makes for amazing birthday photos and memories.
